a: Two parallel metal plates separated by an insulator
A single metal plate in a vacuum

q: What is the definition of surface charge density $\sigma$ on a plate?
The capacitance of a parallel-plate capacitor is directly proportional to which factor?
How is the capacitance of a parallel-plate capacitor affected by the distance $d$ between the plates?
a: Proportional to the square of distance

q: What is the value of the dielectric constant $\kappa$ for a vacuum?
According to Table 9.1, which material has the highest dielectric constant?
When a dielectric is inserted into a disconnected charged capacitor, what happens to the potential difference?
Which of the following is NOT an advantage of using a dielectric in a capacitor?
a: Decrease in the physical size of the plates
